add opencl to compilation

-index b9a3aaef..79cb3f49 100644
+index b9a3aaef7..b9b8b9e07 100644
 --- a/cmake/config.cmake
 +++ b/cmake/config.cmake
+@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ set(USE_AOCL OFF)
+ # - ON: enable OpenCL with cmake's auto search

+ # Whether enable Metal runtime

  # - ON: enable Vulkan with cmake's auto search

data.author: LucaFos
data.message:
Update TVM version (#7)

This patch is needed to properly run the packages that
use ML models from the modelzoo.

Issue-Id: SCM-3720
Signed-off-by: Luca Foschiani <luca.foschiani@arm.com>
Change-Id: I331efb40337ac15ec6b84ed9b9050fa42e49dc0f

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Copyright 2020-2021 The Autoware Foundation, Arm Ltd.
+# Copyright 2020-2022 The Autoware Foundation, Arm Ltd.
 #
 # Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
 # you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
@@ -52,8 +52,8 @@ if(ROS_VERSION EQUAL 2)
 endif()
 
 ExternalProject_Add(tvm-build
-  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/apache/incubator-tvm
-  GIT_TAG v0.7.0
+  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/apache/tvm
+  GIT_TAG v0.8.0
   GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
   BUILD_IN_SOURCE TRUE
   PATCH_COMMAND git apply ${PATCH_FILE}

@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(tvm_vendor)
+
+# Default to C99
+if(NOT CMAKE_C_STANDARD)
+  set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
+endif()
+
+# Default to C++14
+if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
+  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
+endif()
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+set(tvm_DESTDIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/tvm_install)
+
+include(ExternalProject)
+ExternalProject_Add(tvm
+  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/apache/incubator-tvm
+  GIT_TAG v0.7.0
+  GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
+  BUILD_IN_SOURCE TRUE
+  INSTALL_DIR ${tvm_DESTDIR}
+  PATCH_COMMAND git apply ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/config.cmake.patch
+  CONFIGURE_COMMAND cp build/config.cmake .; ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=<INSTALL_DIR> -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
+)
+
+file(GLOB SHARED_LIBS
+  "${tvm_DESTDIR}/lib/*.so"
+)
+
+set(SHORT_LIBS "")
+
+foreach(SHARED_LIB ${SHARED_LIBS})
+  string(REPLACE ${tvm_DESTDIR}/lib/ "" SHORT_LIB ${SHARED_LIB})
+  list(APPEND SHORT_LIBS ${SHORT_LIB})
+endforeach()
+
+ament_export_include_directories(include)
+ament_export_libraries(${SHORT_LIBS})
+
+install(DIRECTORY ${tvm_DESTDIR}/include/
+  DESTINATION include
+)
+
+install(DIRECTORY ${tvm_DESTDIR}/lib/
+  DESTINATION lib
+)
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# TVM Vendor ROS Package
+
+A ROS package wrapper around the [Apache TVM project](https://tvm.apache.org).

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+From 10c90f246c524cdb3dea109e7b530f565ef4bc20 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
+From: Joshua Whitley <josh.whitley@autoware.org>
+Date: Mon, 16 Nov 2020 10:35:04 -0600
+Subject: [PATCH] Test commit.
+
+---
+ cmake/config.cmake | 4 ++--
+ 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)
+
+diff --git a/cmake/config.cmake b/cmake/config.cmake
+index 9754385fa..126c90196 100644
+--- a/cmake/config.cmake
++++ b/cmake/config.cmake
+@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ set(USE_MICRO_STANDALONE_RUNTIME OFF)
+ # - ON: enable llvm with cmake's find search
+ # - OFF: disable llvm
+ # - /path/to/llvm-config: enable specific LLVM when multiple llvm-dev is available.
+-set(USE_LLVM OFF)
++set(USE_LLVM ON)
+ 
+ #---------------------------------------------
+ # Contrib libraries
+@@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ set(USE_LLVM OFF)
+ set(USE_BYODT_POSIT OFF)
+ 
+ # Whether use BLAS, choices: openblas, atlas, apple
+-set(USE_BLAS none)
++set(USE_BLAS openblas)
+ 
+ # Whether to use MKL
+ # Possible values:
+-- 
+2.25.1
+

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>tvm_vendor</name>
+  <version>0.7.0</version>
+  <description>Wrapper around Apache TVM to make it available to the ROS ecosystem.</description>
+  <maintainer email="josh.whitley@autoware.org">Josh Whitley</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>
+
+  <url type="bugtracker">https://github.com/casadi/casadi/issues</url>
+  <url type="repository">https://github.com/casadi/casadi</url>
+  <url type="website">http://casadi.org/</url>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <depend>git</depend>
+  <depend>libopenblas-dev</depend>
+  <depend>llvm-dev</depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: kurcha01-arm
data.message:
Fix dlpack and tvm-runtime header inclusion

Partial fix for issue #2. Previously, including these headers required
e.g.:

\#include <tvm_vendor/tvm_vendor/dlpack/dlpack.h>

But now we can use

\#include <tvm_vendor/dlpack/dlpack.h>

Signed-off-by: Kurtis Charnock <kurtis.charnock@arm.com>
Issue-Id: SCM-1400
Change-Id: I4e9868598bd4cc5e81f11bdc275fdd360adc0799

files.patch:
@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ elseif(${ROS_VERSION} EQUAL 2)
   ament_export_libraries(tvm tvm_runtime)
 
   install(DIRECTORY ${SOURCE_DIR}/include/tvm/runtime/
-    DESTINATION include/${PROJECT_NAME}/tvm/runtime
+    DESTINATION include/tvm/runtime
   )
 
   install(
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ elseif(${ROS_VERSION} EQUAL 2)
     FILES
       ${SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty/dlpack/include/dlpack/dlpack.h
       ${SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty/dlpack/contrib/dlpack/dlpackcpp.h
-    DESTINATION include/${PROJECT_NAME}/dlpack
+    DESTINATION include/dlpack
   )
 
   install(DIRECTORY ${SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty/dmlc-core/include/dmlc

data.author: ambroise-arm
data.message:
Add Vulkan backend

Enable Vulkan backend for the ROS2 version of the package.

Issue-Id: SCM-1941
Signed-off-by: Ambroise Vincent <ambroise.vincent@arm.com>
Change-Id: I810d1873d8727ed6b6dd93d3735c9c7230739d0d

 project(tvm_vendor)
 
 find_package(ros_environment REQUIRED)
@@ -32,12 +46,17 @@ endif()
 
 include(ExternalProject)
 
+set(PATCH_FILE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/config.cmake.patch)
+if(ROS_VERSION EQUAL 2)
+  set(PATCH_FILE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/config.cmake.gpu.patch)
+endif()
+
 ExternalProject_Add(tvm-build
   GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/apache/incubator-tvm
   GIT_TAG v0.7.0
   GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
   BUILD_IN_SOURCE TRUE
-  PATCH_COMMAND git apply ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/config.cmake.patch
+  PATCH_COMMAND git apply ${PATCH_FILE}
   COMMAND cp <SOURCE_DIR>/cmake/config.cmake <SOURCE_DIR>
   CONFIGURE_COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON
   INSTALL_COMMAND ""

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+diff --git a/cmake/config.cmake b/cmake/config.cmake
+index 9754385fa..a093f61fe 100644
+--- a/cmake/config.cmake
++++ b/cmake/config.cmake
+@@ -79,7 +79,7 @@ set(USE_METAL OFF)
+ # - ON: enable Vulkan with cmake's auto search
+ # - OFF: disable vulkan
+ # - /path/to/vulkan-sdk: use specific path to vulkan-sdk
+-set(USE_VULKAN OFF)
++set(USE_VULKAN ON)
+ 
+ # Whether enable OpenGL runtime
+ set(USE_OPENGL OFF)
+@@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ set(USE_LLVM OFF)
+ set(USE_BYODT_POSIT OFF)
+ 
+ # Whether use BLAS, choices: openblas, atlas, apple
+-set(USE_BLAS none)
++set(USE_BLAS openblas)
+ 
+ # Whether to use MKL
+ # Possible values:

@@ -1,14 +1,5 @@
-From 10c90f246c524cdb3dea109e7b530f565ef4bc20 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001

-Date: Mon, 16 Nov 2020 10:35:04 -0600

----

 diff --git a/cmake/config.cmake b/cmake/config.cmake
-index 9754385fa..126c90196 100644
+index 9754385fa..530c4bee1 100644
 --- a/cmake/config.cmake
 +++ b/cmake/config.cmake
 @@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ set(USE_LLVM OFF)
